raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/year>, there was a charge on my Macys account for purchases not authorized by me. I informed Macys that this was fraud. One charge was for {$300.00} on XX/XX/year>XXXX  and another charge was for {$160.00} on XX/XX/year>. I called Macys customer service line and informed them that these were not my transactions and spoke to a several different representatives Over the next two weeks regarding this issue. This occurred between XXXX and all the way to end of XXXX. I even spoke to an investigator and a detective who learned that an individual was apprehended and charged for this fraud. I informed Macys, but they have not responded to my reporting, nor giving me an answer about removing those transactions. This is affected my credit rating as I have not paid that amount as I expect them to remove it. I spoke to my credit agencies who contacted Macys on my behalf and Macys told them that this was indeed my transaction. Obviously that is incorrect, but they are refusing to remove the charges. I have the police file number along with the detective.
